sections.paragraph:
Jephthah H3316
A judge of Israel.
Illegitimate, and therefore not entitled to inherit his father's property
Jdg 11:2
Escapes the violence of his half-brothers, dwells in the land of Tob
Jdg 11:3
Recalled from the land of Tob by the elders of Gilead
Jdg 11:5
Made captain of the host
Jdg 11:11
Made head of the land of Gilead
Jdg 11:11
His message to the king of the Ammonites

Leads the host of Israel against the Ammonites
Jdg 11:33
His rash vow concerning his daughter
Jdg 11:31; Jdg 11:40
Falsely accused by the Ephraimites
Jdg 12:1
Leads the army of the Gileadites against the Ephraimites
Jdg 12:4
Judges Israel six years, dies, and is buried in Gilead
Jdg 12:7
Faith of
Heb 11:32
